role: outer ring road exit ramp into Southgate parking/checkpoint approach
phaser_notes: Use road override rectangles for main driving lanes, parking entrances, and painted-line areas if the car snags on thin mask artifacts.
Driving lanes, ramp, and parking access should remain passable.
Overlay is decorative and should not be used as collision source.
Base is mostly road and drivable surface; future roadside props should remain on overlay/separate assets.
